title: Mary Had A Little Frog
content:
Mary had a little frog
    And it was water-soaked,
    But Mary did not keep it long
    Because, of course, it croaked!
meaning:
"Mary Had A Little Frog" is a quintessential example of Ellis Parker Butler's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
